markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Realigning SEO goals and strategy after reviewing GrowthX's traffic forecast.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Goal Misalignment:** The forecast projects a 2x increase in non-brand SEO clicks by Aug/Sept 2026, but Anything needs a 10-15x increase (from \~20k to 200-300k clicks/mo) within 6 months to justify the investment.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** GrowthX will propose two paths: 1) a revised strategy within the current budget to accelerate growth, and 2) an incremental investment option for a faster, more aggressive push.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [**Domain Strategy:** A key decision is whether to consolidate SEO on `createanything.com` to leverage its current momentum, or `anything.com` to build authority on the final brand domain.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)

## Topics

### Goal Misalignment

  - [The original October 2025 goal was for SEO to drive an incremental 2x increase over total traffic (\~300k sessions/mo) within 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [The current forecast projects a 2x increase in non-brand SEO clicks (from a \~20k/mo baseline) by Aug/Sept 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [This creates a significant gap: Anything needs a 10-15x increase in SEO clicks (to 200-300k/mo) within 6 months for the channel to be a meaningful growth driver.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)

### Strategic Pivot

  - [The current strategy's ROI is questioned due to the slow projected timeline.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [GrowthX will propose two paths to address this:](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
      - [**Path 1 (Current Budget):** A revised strategy to accelerate growth within the existing scope.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
      - [**Path 2 (Incremental Investment):** An option for a larger investment to achieve faster, more aggressive growth.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Dhruv noted that a larger investment with high ROI is preferable to a smaller, inefficient one. The decision will be based on a CAC/LTV calculation, where LTV is \~$220.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Domain Consolidation

  - [**GrowthX Recommendation:** Consolidate SEO on `createanything.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
      - [**Rationale:** It has the most momentum and is already ranking for non-brand terms, offering the fastest path to growth.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
      - [**Action:** Switch all blog canonicals and sitemaps to point to `createanything.com` URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
  - [**Anything's Concern:** This delays building authority for the final brand domain, `anything.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
      - [**Rationale:** All future marketing spend and non-Google traffic will be directed to `anything.com`, which should accelerate its domain authority.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX (Kyle):**](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
      - [Propose two strategic paths: a revised strategy within the current budget and an incremental investment option.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
      - [Analyze the impact of consolidating SEO on `anything.com` vs. `createanything.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
      - [Deliver a follow-up proposal next week.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [**Anything (Dhruv):**](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
      - [Review the proposal and decide on the domain consolidation strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
      - [Implement server-side tracking (Dub) to measure SEO revenue impact.](https://fathom.video/share/ygeAAPprsxLRdphiFMCk-Qx9JZd1ox49?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
